title: Coal Indias Production Continues To Grow Stockpiles Continue To Declinenbsp
section_path: Coal Indias Production Continues To Grow Stockpiles Continue To Declinenbsp
section_path_text: Coal Indias Production Continues To Grow Stockpiles Continue To Declinenbsp
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in our most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, Coal India produced approximately 61 million tons of coal in October. This has marked a month-on-month increase of 9.6 million tons (19%) and a year-on-year increase of 8.1 million tons (15%). Coal India's production has now increased on a year-on-year basis during twenty-nine of the last thirty months.
